long_term.summary: Stagflation risks rising with oil shock potentially reversing rate cut expectations. However, deep ITM call buying in tech megacaps suggests institutional confidence in 30-day horizon

options_flow_impact: Neutral put/call ratio at 1.033 masks significant positioning divergence. Deep ITM call buying in NVDA/TSLA/META ($6.9M combined) signals institutional bullishness beyond 30 days, while massive MSFT put position ($2M at 83% ITM) suggests hedging or outright bearishness. Near-term flow lacks conviction
risks: Iran military escalation triggering oil above $100
Emergency Fed meeting if markets destabilize
Tech earnings disappointments amid macro concerns
